hero.headline: Integrated Catering & Central Kitchen Solutions
hero.subheadline: A large-scale food production and catering group headquartered in Makkah, Saudi Arabia — serving institutions, hotels, government, and Hajj & Umrah pilgrims with precision and scale.

about.headline: Built for Scale. Engineered for Excellence.
about.body: Elite Horizon Catering is an integrated catering and food production group based in Makkah, Saudi Arabia. We operate a state-of-the-art multi-floor central kitchen capable of producing thousands of meals daily across hot, cold, ready-meal, and specialty formats. Our operations span Hajj and Umrah seasons, year-round hospitality, healthcare, education, and institutional catering — delivering consistent quality at unmatched scale.
keyPoints: Integrated central kitchen with full production-to-delivery capability
HACCP-aligned food safety and quality management protocols

fullPage.headline: About Elite Horizon Catering
fullPage.intro: Elite Horizon Catering — مسارات النخبة للإعاشة — is one of Saudi Arabia's most capable integrated catering and central kitchen operations, headquartered in the heart of Makkah.
fullPage.story: Founded with a clear mandate to redefine food production and delivery at institutional scale, we bring together advanced kitchen infrastructure, food science expertise, and deep sector knowledge to serve clients who demand reliability, compliance, and quality — every single day.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the most trusted integrated catering partner in the GCC — combining industrial-scale production, nutritional precision, and operational reliability.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.text: To deliver safe, nutritious, and high-quality food solutions across all catering sectors — from Hajj pilgrim meals to executive dining — through technology-driven processes and a dedicated team.

points.title: Operational Scale
points.desc: Capacity to serve thousands of meals per day from a single integrated facility — with zero compromise on quality.

points.title: Regulatory Compliance
points.desc: Aligned with Saudi Food and Drug Authority standards, HACCP principles, and international food safety frameworks.

points.title: End-to-End Capability
points.desc: From raw material procurement and central kitchen production to cold-chain logistics and on-site service delivery.

points.title: Sector Expertise
points.desc: Specialized protocols for Hajj, healthcare, education, hotels, and industrial catering — each with unique requirements.

services.headline: Five Core Service Lines
services.subheadline: Each service line is built with dedicated production zones, specialist teams, and tailored delivery protocols.

items.title: Consulting & Research
items.shortDesc: Strategic food service consulting, menu engineering, and operational research for catering organizations.
items.fullDesc: We provide expert consulting services to food service operators, institutions, and government bodies across Saudi Arabia. Our team combines food science, operations management, and sector-specific knowledge to design scalable, compliant, and cost-efficient catering systems.
features: Catering feasibility studies and operational audits

items.title: Food Technology Solutions
items.shortDesc: Advanced food processing, product development, and technology-driven production optimization.
items.fullDesc: Our food technology division applies industrial food science to improve production efficiency, extend shelf life, and maintain consistent product quality. We develop ready-meal formats, custom diet programs, and product lines designed for mass consumption.

items.title: Mass Catering Services
items.shortDesc: Large-scale hot meals, dry ration packs, and ready meals for institutions, events, and Hajj operations.
items.fullDesc: Our flagship service — mass catering at industrial scale. We produce and deliver thousands of meals daily in hot-meal, dry-ration, and ready-meal formats. Purpose-built for Hajj pilgrim feeding, institutional contracts, and large-scale events.
features: Hot meal production with same-day delivery
Dry ration and packaged meal assembly
Ready meal manufacturing with extended shelf life
Hajj and Umrah seasonal catering operations
Military, government, and institutional feeding contracts

items.title: Healthy & Diet Meals
items.shortDesc: Nutritionally designed meal programs for healthcare, corporate wellness, and specialized dietary requirements.
items.fullDesc: Precision-designed meal programs developed in collaboration with dietitians and nutritional scientists. We cater to hospitals, corporate wellness programs, sports nutrition, and individuals with specific dietary needs — including diabetic, renal, cardiac, and low-calorie protocols.
features: Clinical diet meal programs for healthcare facilities
Corporate wellness and executive meal plans
Diabetic, cardiac, and renal diet menus
Sports nutrition and high-performance meal plans

items.title: Bakery & Desserts
items.shortDesc: Industrial bakery production — breads, pastries, Arabic sweets, and desserts at commercial scale.
items.fullDesc: A dedicated bakery facility producing a wide range of breads, pastries, Arabic sweets, and dessert products at commercial scale. Our bakery serves hospitality clients, institutional catering contracts, and retail supply chains with consistent, high-quality products.
features: Custom cake and dessert programs for hotels
Frozen and fresh bakery product lines

sectors.headline: Eight Sectors. One Trusted Partner.
sectors.subheadline: We build sector-specific catering systems — not generic solutions. Every vertical has its own protocols, compliance requirements, and operational demands.

items.title: Hajj & Umrah
items.shortDesc: Feeding millions of pilgrims with precision, compliance, and cultural sensitivity during the world's largest annual gathering.
items.challenge: Hajj operations demand peak-capacity production under extreme time pressure, serving millions of pilgrims across geographically dispersed sites.
items.solution: We deploy multi-unit production teams, pre-positioned logistics, and scaled packaging lines to deliver compliant meals on time — every time.

items.title: Hotels & Hospitality
items.shortDesc: Premium food supply and catering management for 4-star and 5-star hotel properties across the region.
items.challenge: Hotels require consistent quality, flexible menus, and on-brand food presentation at unpredictable volumes.
items.solution: We provide dedicated hotel catering programs with menu customization, daily production schedules, and branded presentation standards.

items.title: Healthcare & Medical
items.shortDesc: Clinical nutrition programs and hospital meal services meeting SFDA and international dietary standards.
items.challenge: Healthcare catering must meet strict nutritional guidelines, allergen controls, and patient safety protocols.
items.solution: Our clinical dietitian-developed menus are produced in controlled environments with full traceability and HACCP-certified processes.

items.title: Education
items.shortDesc: School and university meal programs designed for nutritional value, cost-efficiency, and compliance.
items.challenge: School feeding requires high-volume, cost-controlled production with child-appropriate nutrition and regulatory compliance.
items.solution: We design age-appropriate, nutritionally balanced school meal programs with efficient delivery systems and waste management protocols.

items.title: Industrial & Remote Sites
items.shortDesc: Remote camp and industrial workforce catering with full logistics infrastructure.
items.challenge: Remote industrial sites need reliable, high-volume feeding with minimal infrastructure dependency.
items.solution: We deploy mobile kitchen systems and insulated transport fleets to serve industrial worksites and remote camps across Saudi Arabia.

items.title: Events & Functions
items.shortDesc: Large-scale event catering for conferences, government functions, sporting events, and corporate gatherings.
items.challenge: Event catering requires flexible menu design, precision timing, and large-volume rapid deployment.
items.solution: Our events team plans, produces, and delivers complete food service packages — from setup to service to breakdown.

items.title: Charity & Social Programs
items.shortDesc: Iftar programs, community feeding, and charitable food distribution at scale.
items.challenge: Charitable food programs demand cost efficiency without sacrificing nutrition, halal integrity, or cultural appropriateness.
items.solution: We manage high-volume charitable meal production and distribution for Ramadan Iftar programs, community kitchens, and disaster relief efforts.

items.title: Remote Camps & Military
items.shortDesc: Dedicated catering infrastructure for military bases, construction camps, and government remote installations.
items.challenge: Military and camp catering requires strict security compliance, consistent quality, and large-scale logistics.
items.solution: We provide dedicated camp catering contracts with on-site management teams, specialized menus, and military-standard food safety protocols.

facility.headline: A Central Kitchen Built for Industrial Scale
facility.subheadline: Our Makkah facility is purpose-built for high-volume food production — combining advanced processing zones, cold chain infrastructure, and quality control laboratories under one integrated operation.

zones.title: Production Zones
zones.desc: Dedicated cooking halls equipped with industrial ranges, steam-jacketed kettles, combi ovens, and automated portioning systems. Each production zone is designed for a specific meal type — hot meals, cold preparation, and ready-meal assembly.

zones.title: Cold Storage & Refrigeration
zones.desc: Multi-chamber cold storage with distinct temperature zones for raw materials, semi-finished products, and finished goods. Our refrigeration infrastructure maintains strict cold-chain integrity from intake to dispatch.

zones.title: Packaging & Assembly
zones.desc: High-speed packaging lines for tray sealing, vacuum packaging, and dry ration assembly. Purpose-designed for high-volume output with integrated check-weighing and labeling systems.

zones.title: Quality Control Laboratory
zones.desc: An in-house food safety laboratory conducting microbiological, chemical, and sensory testing on incoming raw materials and finished products — ensuring every batch meets SFDA and internal quality standards.

zones.title: Logistics & Dispatch
zones.desc: A dedicated dispatch zone with temperature-controlled loading bays, fleet management systems, and real-time delivery tracking. Our vehicles are equipped with insulated and refrigerated compartments for hot and cold product delivery.

fullPage.intro: Elite Horizon Catering's central kitchen facility in Makkah is the backbone of our operations. Spanning multiple floors and purpose-designed production zones, the facility integrates every step of the food production chain — from raw material intake to finished product dispatch.

items.desc: Raw material intake, dry storage, cold storage, and logistics dispatch zone.
Primary cooking halls, hot meal production, and soup & sauce preparation.
Cold preparation, salad assembly, dairy, and bakery production.
Packaging and tray-sealing lines, labeling, and finished goods storage.
Quality control lab, microbiological testing, and food safety management.

process.headline: From Source to Service
process.subheadline: Every meal we produce follows a rigorous, traceable process designed for safety, consistency, and scale.

steps.title: Raw Materials
steps.desc: Certified supplier procurement with incoming quality inspection and traceability documentation.

steps.title: Preparation
steps.desc: Controlled pre-processing — washing, cutting, marinating — in dedicated preparation zones.

steps.title: Cooking
steps.desc: Industrial cooking using calibrated equipment with time-temperature monitoring and batch records.

steps.title: Packaging
steps.desc: Hygienic portioning and sealing on automated packaging lines with weight and label checks.

steps.title: Cold Chain
steps.desc: Rapid chilling and temperature-controlled storage maintaining product integrity until dispatch.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.desc: Refrigerated and insulated fleet delivery with GPS tracking and proof-of-delivery documentation.

steps.title: Service
steps.desc: On-site service delivery, buffet setup, or direct distribution — as specified by the client contract.

certifications.headline: Certified. Compliant. Trusted.
certifications.subheadline: Our operations are aligned with Saudi and international food safety standards.

items.title: SFDA License
items.desc: Saudi Food and Drug Authority certified food production facility.

items.title: HACCP Compliance
items.desc: Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points system fully implemented.

items.title: ISO 22000
items.desc: Food safety management system meeting international standards.

items.title: Halal Certification
items.desc: Fully halal-certified production from raw materials to finished product.

items.title: Municipality License
items.desc: Makkah Municipality approved commercial food production premises.

items.title: MOH Compliance
items.desc: Ministry of Health dietary and nutritional standards adherence.

equipment.headline: Industrial-Grade Equipment. Professional-Grade Results.
equipment.subheadline: Our central kitchen is equipped with commercial-grade machinery across every production category.

items.name: Industrial Gas Ranges
items.desc: Heavy-duty multi-burner ranges for high-volume cooking.

items.name: Steam-Jacketed Kettles
items.desc: 200–500 litre capacity for soups, sauces, and rice.

items.name: Combi Ovens
items.desc: Programmable combination steam-convection ovens.

items.name: Tilting Braising Pans
items.desc: Large-format pans for meat, stews, and bulk cooking.

items.name: Deep Fryers
items.desc: Industrial fryers with filtration and auto temperature control.

items.name: Pressure Cookers
items.desc: Large-capacity commercial pressure cooking units.

items.name: Deck Ovens
items.desc: Multi-deck stone-based ovens for bread and pastry.

items.name: Spiral Dough Mixers
items.desc: High-capacity dough preparation for bread production.

items.name: Sheeting Machines
items.desc: Automated dough sheeting and laminating equipment.

items.name: Proving Cabinets
items.desc: Temperature and humidity-controlled fermentation chambers.

items.name: Depositors & Moulders
items.desc: Automated portion-control and shaping equipment.

items.name: Walk-In Cold Rooms
items.desc: Large-format cold rooms for raw materials (0–4°C).

items.name: Blast Chillers
items.desc: Rapid chilling from +70°C to +3°C in under 90 minutes.

items.name: Blast Freezers
items.desc: Deep-freeze units for long-term product preservation.

items.name: Refrigerated Display Units
items.desc: Service-ready cold display for buffet and distribution.

items.name: Temperature Monitoring
items.desc: 24/7 IoT-based temperature logging across all cold zones.

items.name: Chafing Dishes
items.desc: Stainless steel electric and gel-fuel chafing systems.

items.name: Bain-Marie Units
items.desc: Electric heated display for hot-holding and service.

items.name: Insulated Transport Containers
items.desc: GN-compatible insulated food transport carts.

items.name: Service Counters
items.desc: Modular stainless buffet counters for event and institutional service.

items.name: Work Benches & Preparation Tables
items.desc: Grade 316 stainless steel preparation surfaces throughout.

items.name: Shelving Systems
items.desc: Wall-mounted and freestanding stainless storage.

items.name: Pot Wash & Dishwash
items.desc: Industrial rack and tunnel dishwashers.

items.name: Exhaust Canopies
items.desc: High-extraction ventilation above all cooking stations.

items.name: Floor Drainage
items.desc: Stainless channel drainage systems throughout all production zones.
